trigger_conditions: Any confirmed active threat on campus
actions: ["Initiate lockdown immediately", "Call 911 — provide school address and threat details", "Activate SchoolMessenger parent notification", "Establish reunification at First Baptist Church 1300 Oak St", "Coordinate with Metro Nashville PD on scene", "Activate crisis counseling team within 2 hours of all-clear", "Send parent reunification instructions via SchoolMessenger"]
critical_functions: Student safety and accountability; Parent communication and reunification; Crisis counseling; Law enforcement coordination
notes: Reunification protocol: parents show ID at church. Students released one at a time.

trigger_conditions: Tornado warning or severe storm making travel unsafe
actions: ["Monitor NWS alerts and Metro Nashville emergency management", "Decision to close by 5:30 AM — notify via SchoolMessenger", "If storm hits during school: shelter in place in interior rooms", "Interior shelter locations: hallways A B C D and library storage room", "Keep students away from windows and exterior walls", "After all-clear: assess building damage before resuming", "If building damaged: relocate to First Baptist Church"]
critical_functions: Student safety; Parent notification; Building damage assessment
notes: Remote learning can activate within 2 hours via Canvas LMS.

trigger_conditions: Flash flood warning or rising water near school
actions: ["Move all students and staff to Floor 2 immediately", "Shut off electrical power to Floor 1 — electrocution risk", "Do NOT walk through floodwater", "Secure cafeteria kitchen gas supply", "Contact parents via SchoolMessenger for early pickup", "If water enters building: evacuate to First Baptist Church via west exit (higher ground)"]
critical_functions: Student safety; Floor 1 equipment protection; Utility shutoff
notes: School sits in 500-year floodplain. Low risk but flash floods possible.

trigger_conditions: Confirmed ransomware or major cyber incident
actions: ["Disconnect all affected systems from network", "Switch to paper-based operations: attendance gradebook lunch", "Notify cyber insurance within 24 hours: Policy #EDU-2026-4491", "Tech Jordan leads technical response", "If student data affected: FERPA 60-day notification clock starts", "Restore from Synology NAS backups after forensic clearance", "Notify parents if PII compromised"]
critical_functions: Student records continuity (paper backup); Communication (personal phones); Teaching (offline materials)
notes: Cyber insurance covers forensic investigation and notification costs.

trigger_conditions: Power outage lasting more than 2 hours
actions: ["Activate battery backup for security cameras and PA system", "If heating/cooling affected: assess whether building is habitable", "Notify Nashville Electric Service: 615-736-6900", "If during school hours and >2 hours: begin early dismissal", "Notify parents via SchoolMessenger (mobile app works without school internet)", "Move perishable cafeteria food to freezer (backup generator)", "If overnight: cancel next day if power not restored by 5 AM"]
notes: Generator powers: security cameras server room refrigeration. NOT HVAC or lighting.

trigger_conditions: Any felt earthquake or seismic event
actions: ["Do NOT evacuate during shaking — Drop Cover Hold On", "After shaking stops: shut off gas water and electrical", "Evacuate if any structural damage visible", "Check all zones for injuries especially mobility-limited staff", "Inspect science lab Room 215 for chemical spills", "Do not re-enter building until structural assessment complete", "Contact structural engineer: Nashville Building Inspections 615-862-6590"]
critical_functions: Personnel safety; Utility shutoff; Structural assessment; Chemical containment
notes: Nashville is in seismic zone — New Madrid fault. Low probability high consequence.
